text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Fan Fest has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is competing in one of the festival's
main events—the carrot bread-eating race.
However...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Th-there are so many people here. They must all
be... our fans...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Gulp.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Urk! Trainer, help! Wh-what should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The pressure to not disappoint my fans... It's... It's
making my heart beat out of my chest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to think of some way to calm her nerves,
when...

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's the runner from the Kikuka Sho! I watched
you race on TV! You were so cool!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Uhhh, are you talking about me?!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be just like you when I grow up! Teehee!
Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And... off she goes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that takes me back. I wonder if I was like
that when I was little too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to race like the Umamusume I saw on
TV... That's when I started dreaming of becoming
the best in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're right! Now it's my time to inspire
children to dream.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty, Trainer! Off I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, Special Week shakes off her nerves
and steps up to join the carrot bread-eating race.
As for the results...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Aww... I lost!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
While I was running, I thought I had a chance to
win, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I really blew it, huh? I really wanted to look cool in front of that kid.
choice_data_list: You'll get another chance at the Tenno Sho!
You'll get another chance at the Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'll make sure I don't let my fans down
next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's defeat at the Fan Fest appears to
inspire her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I won! First place! I did it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
While I was running, I was like, "I think I got this!"
And then... I did! I think I figured out a new
running technique!

text_block_list.name: Chairman (Akikawa)
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! I must say, you put on a great show today,
Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Director?! Wh-what are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Chairman (Akikawa)
text_block_list.text: Hah! I'm here to reward you...

text_block_list.name: Chairman (Akikawa)
text_block_list.text: Just listen to those cheers!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, you were amazing! I'll be cheering
you on like crazy in the future!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Good luck at the Tenno Sho too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Chairman (Akikawa)
text_block_list.text: Keep up the great work! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you! Thanks so much, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll work even harder to become the top
Umamusume in all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's performance at the Fan Fest has
led to a burst of motivation.
